profile.name: Vo Phu Thinh
profile.title: AI Engineer
profile.company: HPT Vietnam Corporation — AI Center of Excellence
profile.availability: Open to hire — full-time, contract, freelance, and remote opportunities
profile.key_strength: Ships production AI fast — 3 products in first year
profile.summary: AI Engineer specializing in LLM, RAG, AI Agents, and Machine Learning. Shipped 3 AI products to production in first year. Won 2 awards in enterprise AI competition at HPT Vietnam.
profile.education: Bachelor's degree, Information Technology — HUTECH & Open University Malaysia (2021–2025)
what_can_deliver_90_days: Weeks 1–2: Analyze business workflows, data sources, and pain points to identify highest-impact AI use cases
Weeks 3–6: Build and deploy a production-ready chatbot or RAG system integrated with existing tools
Weeks 7–10: Set up evaluation pipelines, experiment tracking, and model versioning for reliable AI development
Weeks 11–12: Deliver monitoring dashboards for quality, latency, usage, and cost plus a roadmap for next phase
awards: 2nd Prize — AI in Business Competition (HPT, 2025) — Lyly AI Assistant
3rd Prize — AI in Business Competition (HPT, 2025) — HotNews Intelligence Hub

experience.company: HPT Vietnam Corporation — AI Center of Excellence
highlights: Won 2nd & 3rd prizes in AI in Business competition
Developed LLM-powered solutions for executive decision support
Built 10+ automation workflows, cutting manual reporting by ~60%
Prototyped AI chatbot that evolved into D-DAY 2025 product
Promoted to full-time after 6 months — fastest track in team

experience.company: Institute of Smart City and Management
highlights: Managed and maintained organizational website content
Improved SEO structure and supported analytics reporting

projects_fallback.title: HPT D-DAY 2025 Chatbot
projects_fallback.summary: RAG-powered AI chatbot grounded on official event data with zero hallucination.
projects_fallback.problem: Attendees and organizers needed instant, accurate answers for schedule, sessions, booths, and partners at HPT D-DAY 2025.
projects_fallback.solution: Built zero-hallucination RAG chatbot with GPT-4o + vector retrieval, powered by n8n and Google Sheets for real-time content updates.
projects_fallback.results: Operated stably throughout the event and significantly reduced onsite support workload.

projects_fallback.title: Lyly — Enterprise AI Assistant (2nd Prize)
projects_fallback.summary: Enterprise AI assistant with real-time voice/text, hybrid RAG, and multi-step reasoning.
projects_fallback.problem: HPT executives needed faster, data-driven decisions with unified retrieval, reasoning, and conversational interface.
projects_fallback.solution: Built production AI assistant using FastAPI + Next.js with Gemini, Qdrant, hybrid search, corrective RAG, and memory personalization.
projects_fallback.results: Delivered enterprise decision-support platform with real-time conversations and reasoning.

projects_fallback.title: H.I.H — HotNews Intelligence Hub (3rd Prize)
projects_fallback.summary: AI-powered news intelligence platform automating collection, analysis, and internal distribution.
projects_fallback.problem: Internal teams lacked unified business intelligence workflow, causing manual effort and inconsistent information quality.
projects_fallback.solution: Automated intelligence pipeline from collection to classification, recommendation summaries, and distribution via Microsoft Viva Engage.
projects_fallback.results: Improved internal communications quality and established foundation for AI strategy support.

projects_fallback.title: E-Commerce with Sentiment Analysis
projects_fallback.summary: Multi-vendor e-commerce platform with AI sentiment analysis for product reviews.
projects_fallback.problem: Sellers lacked automated visibility into customer sentiment trends across product reviews.
projects_fallback.solution: Integrated BERTweet sentiment classification and built full commerce stack with real-time chat and payment integrations.
projects_fallback.results: Enabled data-driven product and service improvements from unstructured review signals.
